articles.title: Global AI safety summit concludes with new oversight framework
articles.socialimage: Representatives from 28 nations agreed on a voluntary framework for frontier AI model evaluation, including pre-deployment testing and incident reporting. The agreement stops short of binding regulation but establishes a shared registry of high-capability systems.

articles.title: Major chipmaker reports record quarterly earnings on AI demand
articles.socialimage: The company posted revenue well above analyst expectations, driven by data-center GPU sales. Executives cited sustained demand from cloud providers building out large-model training clusters, and raised full-year guidance.

articles.title: Central bank holds interest rates steady amid cooling inflation
articles.socialimage: Policymakers kept the benchmark rate unchanged for a third consecutive meeting, noting that inflation has moved closer to the target range. The bank signaled it expects to begin gradual cuts later in the year if current trends continue.

articles.title: Renewable energy capacity overtakes coal in national grid milestone
articles.socialimage: Solar and wind generation accounted for a larger share of electricity than coal for the first full quarter on record, according to grid operator data. Storage deployment and transmission upgrades were credited as key enablers.

articles.title: Health regulators approve first at-home diagnostic for early screening
articles.socialimage: The approved test allows individuals to collect samples at home and receive lab-analyzed results, which officials said could expand access in underserved regions. Clinicians urged that positive results still require follow-up confirmation.

articles.title: Tech firms pledge interoperability standards for AI agents
articles.socialimage: A consortium of technology companies announced a shared protocol intended to let AI agents from different vendors exchange tasks and data. Backers compared the effort to early web standards and said reference implementations would be open-sourced.

articles.title: Coalition launches initiative to expand semiconductor manufacturing
articles.socialimage: The multi-year initiative pairs public funding with private investment to build new fabrication plants and train a domestic workforce. Analysts said the plan could ease supply concentration but would take years to affect output.

articles.title: Researchers report progress on long-duration grid battery storage
articles.socialimage: A pilot deployment demonstrated multi-day energy storage using an iron-based chemistry that is cheaper than lithium-ion for grid-scale use. The team said cost and longevity, not peak performance, were the main design goals.
